import sys
import importlib


def configure_paths():
    plugin_path = "/opt/plugins"
    ext_dir = "/opt/extensions"
    vendor_path = "/opt/vendor/lib"
    for p in [plugin_path, ext_dir, vendor_path]:
        if p not in sys.path:
            sys.path.insert(0, p)


configure_paths()


def load_plugin(plugin_name: str) -> object:
    return importlib.import_module(plugin_name)


def load_extension(ext_name: str) -> object:
    return importlib.import_module(ext_name)
